title: Verify report (machine-checkable extract)
description: The units/<UID>/verify.json artifact (JSON-only; no verify.md). Encodes the executor<->verifier LOOP contract + the verifier-independence invariant + the premise-check (the independent COUNTER re-run). verdict/iteration/feedback/defects/socratic/premise_check are required. executor_reasoning_seen MUST be false (independence). FAIL is schema-INVALID unless it carries >=1 defect (each naming a criterion) AND feedback.actionable_changes is non-empty; PASS requires defects==[]; DISAGREE requires a disagreement object. The defect.criterion in brief.acceptance_criteria membership is cross-checked in validate_run.py.

executor_reasoning_seen.description: Independence invariant: the verifier saw brief+debrief+artifacts only, never the executor's chain-of-thought. MUST be false (maker!=checker). Self-attestation, not a platform guarantee (see state-machine Limitation A).

audit_notes.description: Optional free-form record of the verifier's adversarial work (per-criterion independent check, evidence audit, hallucination sweep, budget check) that formerly lived in verify.md prose. Not required — the load-bearing outputs are verdict/feedback/defects/premise_check.

feedback.description: Feedback object. actionable_changes = concrete edits for the next iteration (must be non-empty on FAIL); do_not_touch = what was correct and must be preserved.

defects.description: Top-level defect list. PASS => []; FAIL => >=1, each citing a brief acceptance criterion (membership cross-checked by the validator).

socratic.description: The VERIFIER's own CANONICAL 4-key socratic block on its verdict. Same shape + rules as the debrief block.

premise_check.description: Backstop against premise deflection (the independent COUNTER re-run): the verifier attests it first confirmed the executor's stated premise is the deliverable's LOAD-BEARING claim, then RE-RAN COUNTER on it independently (decoupled, from evidence, never by reading executor reasoning). Provides the field; the templates wire the prose.

disagreement.description: Present iff verdict==DISAGREE: why evidence cannot settle it (routes to Phase 7).

allOf.description: FAIL => >=1 defect AND non-empty feedback.actionable_changes (evidence-bound critique).
PASS => defects == [] (no phantom defects on an accepted unit).
DISAGREE => a disagreement object is present AND complete (why_unresolvable set) (routes to the Phase-7 gate).
